'''vatodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foamite|foamite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foamite|foamite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vatodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vætedheth|vætedheth]] || [[word:vætedhej|vætedhej]] || [[word:vætedhesh|vætedhesh]] || [[word:vætedhe|vætedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vatotodhoth|vatotodhoth]] || [[word:vatotodhoj|vatotodhoj]] || [[word:vatotodhosh|vatotodhosh]] || [[word:vatotodho|vatotodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vatodhoth|vatodhoth]] || [[word:vatodhoj|vatodhoj]] || [[word:vatodhosh|vatodhosh]] || [[word:vatodho|vatodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vatofdhoth|vatofdhoth]] || [[word:vatofdhoj|vatofdhoj]] || [[word:vatofdhosh|vatofdhosh]] || [[word:vatofdhof|vatofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vatodhotho|vatodhotho]] || [[word:vatodhojo|vatodhojo]] || [[word:vatodhosho|vatodhosho]] || [[word:vatodhoko|vatodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vatodhoth|vatodhoth]] || [[word:vatodhoj|vatodhoj]] || [[word:vatodhosh|vatodhosh]] || [[word:vatodho|vatodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vatodhothol|vatodhothol]] || [[word:vatodhojol|vatodhojol]] || [[word:vatodhoshol|vatodhoshol]] || [[word:vatodhokol|vatodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vatodhothotho|vatodhothotho]] || [[word:vatodhojojo|vatodhojojo]] || [[word:vatodhoshosho|vatodhoshosho]] || [[word:vatodhoko|vatodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vatodhothon|vatodhothon]] || [[word:vatodhojon|vatodhojon]] || [[word:vatodhoshon|vatodhoshon]] || [[word:vatodhokon|vatodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vatodhothoro|vatodhothoro]] || [[word:vatodhojoro|vatodhojoro]] || [[word:vatodhoshoro|vatodhoshoro]] || [[word:vatodhokoro|vatodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
